Title: Home page loads correctly
Steps Summary: Navigate to /; observe hero; click CTA; check featured products
Expected Result: Hero + featured products visible; CTA links to /products

Title: Product catalogue loads all products
Steps Summary: Navigate to /products; observe grid; note count
Expected Result: All products in grid; count correct

Title: Product card displays correct info
Steps Summary: Inspect a product card for name/image/price/rating
Expected Result: Name/image/price/rating visible on card

Title: PDP shows all required fields
Steps Summary: Navigate to PDP; check name/brand/price/discount/rating/SKU/stock/description/specs
Expected Result: All fields present and visible

Title: Out-of-stock product cannot be added to cart
Steps Summary: Find OOS product; try Add to Cart on card; check PDP
Expected Result: Add to Cart disabled/absent; PDP button shows Out of Stock

Title: Product specs consistency check
Steps Summary: Navigate to target product PDP; compare RAM in specs vs name/description
Expected Result: Specs should match product name/description — note discrepancy if found

Title: Header search returns correct results
Steps Summary: Type 'gaming' in header search; submit; observe results; test empty results
Expected Result: Navigates to /products?search=gaming with matching results only

Title: Sidebar search filters inline
Steps Summary: Type 'corsair' in sidebar search; compare count vs brand filter for Corsair
Expected Result: Results update in real time; count matches brand filter count — note discrepancy

Title: Category filter works correctly
Steps Summary: Select Laptops; observe results; switch to Monitors; reset
Expected Result: Only matching category products shown; All restores full list

Title: Brand filter works correctly
Steps Summary: Select Samsung brand; observe; reset
Expected Result: Only Samsung products shown; All Brands restores list

Title: Price range filter
Steps Summary: Set slider to £500; observe; reduce to £100; reset
Expected Result: No products above max price shown

Title: Rating filter
Steps Summary: Select 4★ & up; select 3★ & up; reset
Expected Result: Only products at or above minimum rating shown

Title: In-Stock filter
Steps Summary: Enable In Stock Only; compare count; disable
Expected Result: OOS products hidden; count decreases

Title: Clear filters
Steps Summary: Apply category + brand; check clear button count; click Clear
Expected Result: All filters reset; full list shown; Clear button gone

Title: Sort: Price Low to High
Steps Summary: Select Price Low to High; check first products; add Components filter; recheck
Expected Result: Products sorted ascending; note if Components sorted descending instead

Title: Sort: Best Rated
Steps Summary: Select Best Rated; check first and last product ratings
Expected Result: Highest rated first; lower rated later

Title: Add to Cart from listing
Steps Summary: Click Add to Cart on a product card; check badge; add again; go to /cart
Expected Result: Badge increments; item in cart with correct quantity

Title: Add to Cart from PDP with quantity
Steps Summary: Navigate to PDP; increase qty to 3; Add to Cart; check /cart
Expected Result: Cart shows item with qty 3; line subtotal = price × 3

Title: Cart page totals calculation
Preconditions: At least one item in cart
Steps Summary: Add product with qty 2; check line subtotal and cart total; note any discrepancy
Expected Result: Line subtotal = unit price × qty; cart total = subtotal + shipping — note if wrong

Title: Cart quantity controls
Steps Summary: Increment qty; check subtotal; continue beyond stock level; decrement to 1; decrement again
Expected Result: Subtotal updates; removal at 0; note if qty exceeds stock

Title: Remove item from cart
Steps Summary: Click remove on first item; observe totals
Expected Result: Item removed; totals recalculate

Title: Free shipping threshold
Steps Summary: Add items under £50; check shipping; add to reach £50+
Expected Result: Shipping £5.99 below threshold; FREE above

Title: Cart persistence after refresh
Steps Summary: Note cart count; refresh browser; check badge and /cart
Expected Result: Cart contents preserved across refresh

Title: Add to wishlist
Steps Summary: Navigate to PDP; click wishlist button; check badge; check /wishlist
Expected Result: Button filled; badge shows 1; item on wishlist page

Title: Remove from wishlist
Steps Summary: Go to /wishlist; remove item; check badge; check PDP button
Expected Result: Item removed; badge decrements; PDP button unfilled

Title: Wishlist persistence limit
Steps Summary: Add 8 items; add 9th; refresh; check wishlist
Expected Result: Note if 9th item disappears after refresh

Title: Login validation and success
Steps Summary: Submit empty; submit valid email + blank password; submit wrong password; submit correct creds
Expected Result: Empty email error shown; note if blank password has no error; wrong creds error; correct creds log in

Title: Registration validation
Steps Summary: Submit empty; fill partial; enter mismatching passwords; fill all correctly
Expected Result: Required field errors; password mismatch error; valid form registers

Title: Logout
Steps Summary: Click user avatar; click Sign Out; observe header; refresh
Expected Result: User logged out; Sign In button returned; state not restored on refresh

Title: Checkout page layout and summary
Preconditions: At least one item in cart
Steps Summary: Navigate to /checkout from /cart; check order summary; check form sections
Expected Result: Summary matches cart; all three form sections present

Title: Checkout form validation
Steps Summary: Click Place Order without filling; observe errors; test 4-digit card number; fill and resubmit
Expected Result: Required field errors shown; note postcode and card number validation gaps

Title: Successful checkout
Steps Summary: Fill all fields; submit; observe redirect and confirmation; check /cart
Expected Result: Redirects to /order-success; order ref shown; cart empty

Title: Mobile navigation menu
Steps Summary: Load app; click hamburger; observe links; click a link; reopen and close with ✕
Expected Result: Menu opens/closes; navigation works; closes on link click

Title: Header navigation links
Steps Summary: Click Products / Laptops / Monitors / Accessories / About
Expected Result: Each link leads to correct page/filtered view

Title: PDP breadcrumb navigation
Steps Summary: Confirm breadcrumb structure; click each segment
Expected Result: Correct breadcrumb; each segment links correctly
